ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* The general size label (e.g., L, XL) */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* Size label for the US market */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* Size label for the UK market */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* Size label for the EU market */,
  "br_size" TEXT /* Size label for the Brazil market */,
  "bust_range" TEXT /* Range of bust measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "waist_range" TEXT /* Range of waist measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "hips_range" TEXT /* Range of hips measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "shoulder_range" TEXT /* Range of shoulder measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "sleeve_length_range" TEXT /* Range of sleeve length measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "inseam_length_range" TEXT /* Range of inseam length measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "cuff_circumference_range" TEXT /* Range of cuff circumference measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "neck_circumference_range" TEXT /* Range of neck circumference measurements corresponding to the size */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size, including any special notes or considerations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard for the item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the clothing item (e.g., Men's, Women's, Kids') */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the item is intended (e.g., Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for which the item is intended (e.g., 0-2, 3-8, 9-14, Adult) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material(s) used in the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Primary color of the clothing item */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the item is designed (e.g., Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "from_size" TEXT /* The size label to convert from */,
  "to_size" TEXT /* The size label to convert to */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* The equivalent size label in the target market */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., Bust, Waist, Hips, Shoulder, Sleeve, Inseam, Cuff, Neck) */,
  "conversion_details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region where the customer is located */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Customer's bust measurement */,
  "waist" REAL /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "hips" REAL /* Customer's hips measurement */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Customer's shoulder measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Customer's sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Customer's inseam length measurement */,
  "cuff_circumference" REAL /* Customer's cuff circumference measurement */,
  "neck_circumference" REAL /* Customer's neck circumference measurement */,
  "height" REAL /* Customer's height */,
  "weight" REAL /* Customer's weight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., Customer Input, Designer, Automated System) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_adjustment_history" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard being adjusted */,
  "adjustment_details" TEXT /* Details of the size adjustment */,
  "date_adjusted" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was made */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment (e.g., Customer Feedback, Market Trends, Quality Control) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the adjustment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the adjustment (e.g., Proposed, Approved, Rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_adjustment_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)
